The Collection

Everything you need
for a better shower.

01
Long Handle Back Scrubber
14.8" steel-core reinforced handle. Double-sided - soft lather side and firm exfoliating nubs. Non-slip grip stays secure when wet.
Back & Legs Open product page
02
Bath Body Brush
Ergonomic handheld design for the palm. Deep-cleanses torso, arms, and legs while stimulating blood circulation with every use.
Full Body Open product page
03
Scalp Massager
Use wet as a shampoo brush or dry to stimulate circulation and support healthy hair growth. Removes buildup and dandruff without irritating the scalp.
Hair & Scalp Open product page
04
Hexagonal Face Brush
Precision-designed for delicate facial skin. Soft short bristles exfoliate pores, remove dead cells, excess oil, and impurities. Gentle enough for daily use.
Face Open product page

Why Silicone

Cleaner by design,
gentle by feel.

Easy-rinse silicone
Unlike sponge-style loofahs, silicone is non-absorbent and rinses clean quickly, helping your brush feel fresher between showers.
Long-lasting
No batteries, no charging, and no complicated care routine. Use it, rinse it, hang it, and it is ready for tomorrow.
All skin types
Flexible bristles give a satisfying cleanse without the scratchy feeling of harsh exfoliators, making the set easy to use daily.
